text:
>Submitter-Id:	current-users
>Originator:	Bo-Yi Wu <appleboy.tw@gmail.com>
>Organization:	IDEAS of III
>Confidential:	no 
>Synopsis:	Re: ports/144308: [NEW PORT] www/php-plurk-api
>Severity:	non-critical
>Priority:	low
>Category:	ports
>Class:		change-request
>Release:	FreeBSD 7.1-RELEASE-p8 i386
>Environment:
System: FreeBSD freebsd.ee.ccu.edu.tw 7.1-RELEASE-p8 FreeBSD 7.1-RELEASE-p8 #0: Fri Oct 2 07:10:41 UTC 2009 root@i386-builder.daemonology.net:/usr/obj/usr/src/sys/GENERIC i386


	
>Description:
	update distinfo file, and resend ports.
	
>How-To-Repeat:
	
>Fix:

	

--- php-plurk-api.shar begins here ---
# This is a shell archive.  Save it in a file, remove anything before
# this line, and then unpack it by entering "sh file".  Note, it may
# create directories; files and directories will be owned by you and
# have default permissions.
#
# This archive contains:
#
#	./php-plurk-api
#	./php-plurk-api/pkg-descr
#	./php-plurk-api/Makefile
#	./php-plurk-api/pkg-plist
#	./php-plurk-api/files
#	./php-plurk-api/files/pkg-message.in
#	./php-plurk-api/distinfo
#
echo c - ./php-plurk-api
mkdir -p ./php-plurk-api > /dev/null 2>&1
echo x - ./php-plurk-api/pkg-descr
sed 's/^X//' >./php-plurk-api/pkg-descr << '37cd9239b617be10393b9a8bd53bf38a'
X[description of the port]
X
XWWW:	http://port.home.page/
37cd9239b617be10393b9a8bd53bf38a
echo x - ./php-plurk-api/Makefile
sed 's/^X//' >./php-plurk-api/Makefile << '8786a7b711585fef8cdce5e78fa51049'
X# New ports collection makefile for:	php-plurk-api
X# Date created:		2010-02-26
X# Whom:			Bo-Yi Wu <appleboy.tw@gmail.com>
X#
X# $FreeBSD$
X#
X
XPORTNAME=	php-plurk-api
XPORTVERSION=	1.4.2
XCATEGORIES=	www
XMASTER_SITES=	${MASTER_SITE_GOOGLE_CODE} \
X				http://freebsd.ee.ccu.edu.tw/plurk/
XDISTNAME=	php-plurk-api-${PORTVERSION}
X
XMAINTAINER=	appleboy.tw@gmail.com
XCOMMENT=	A Plurk API Implementation with PHP
X
XUSE_ZIP=	yes
XNO_BUILD=	yes
XUSE_PHP=	json curl
X
XWRKSRC=	${WRKDIR}/${PORTNAME}
X
XSUB_LIST+=	PKGNAME=${PKGNAME}
XSUB_FILES=	pkg-message
X
X.include <bsd.port.pre.mk>
X
Xdo-install:
X	@${MV} ${WRKSRC}\ ${PORTVERSION} ${WRKSRC}
X	@${ECHO_CMD} '@exec ${MV} ${WRKSRC}\ ${PORTVERSION} \
X		${WRKSRC}' >> ${TMPPLIST}
X	@cd ${WRKSRC} && ${COPYTREE_SHARE} . ${WWWDIR}
X	@${CHOWN} -R ${WWWOWN}:${WWWGRP} ${WWWDIR}
X	@${ECHO_CMD} '@exec ${CHOWN} -R ${WWWOWN}:${WWWGRP} \
X		${PHPBBDIR:S|^${PREFIX}/|%D/|}' >> ${TMPPLIST}
X	@${FIND} ${WWWDIR} -type f -print0 | ${XARGS} -0 ${CHMOD} 644
X	@${ECHO_CMD} '@exec ${FIND} ${WWWDIR} -type f -print0 | \
X		${XARGS} -0 ${CHMOD} 644' >> ${TMPPLIST}
X	@${FIND} ${WWWDIR} -type d -print0 | ${XARGS} -0 ${CHMOD} 755
X	@${ECHO_CMD} '@exec ${FIND} ${WWWDIR} -type d -print0 | \
X		${XARGS} -0 ${CHMOD} 755' >> ${TMPPLIST}
X	@${CHMOD} 755 ${WWWDIR}/example.php
X	@${ECHO_CMD} '@exec ${CHMOD} 755 ${WWWDIR}/example.php' >> ${TMPPLIST}
X
Xpost-install:
X	@${CAT} ${PKGMESSAGE}
X
X.include <bsd.port.post.mk>
8786a7b711585fef8cdce5e78fa51049
echo x - ./php-plurk-api/pkg-plist
sed 's/^X//' >./php-plurk-api/pkg-plist << '00e6100d51219df0c4f66af8a527258b'

00e6100d51219df0c4f66af8a527258b
echo c - ./php-plurk-api/files
mkdir -p ./php-plurk-api/files > /dev/null 2>&1
echo x - ./php-plurk-api/files/pkg-message.in
sed 's/^X//' >./php-plurk-api/files/pkg-message.in << 'b6ec2c0ac849f29ba6e70d21b996a2c0'
X
X**********************************************
XPlurk API provides a standard way of accessing 
Xand implementing applications on top of the Plurk 
Xplatform. The API is a simple HTTP API that can be 
Xaccessed from any language that supports creation 
Xof HTTP requests.
X
XThe API returns JSON encoded data. You should use 
Xa JSON library to decode the data returned. Some 
Xgood JSON libraries are simplejson (Python), 
XJSON.simple (Java) or json (Ruby) or json (PHP).
X
XThe current limit is 50.000 calls pr. day. If you 
Xneed more than this contact us with a description 
Xof what you are making. 
X
X
X%%PKGNAME%% has been installed into :
X
X    %%WWWDIR%%
X
Xphp-plurk-api is a Plurk API Client implementation with PHP.  
X
X	the API Official Website:
X	http://www.plurk.com/API
X 
X	Code Repository:
X	https://code.google.com/p/php-plurk-api/
X
X	php-plurk-api online documents:
X	http://plurk.lab3.tw/docs/
X
X**********************************************
X
b6ec2c0ac849f29ba6e70d21b996a2c0
echo x - ./php-plurk-api/distinfo
sed 's/^X//' >./php-plurk-api/distinfo << '3e25ef9b50c20210141355a0e9eb308c'

3e25ef9b50c20210141355a0e9eb308c
